label: Cinderstep Quarters
description: Cinderstep Quarters is a compact habitation suite cut into Cyrenth Bastion-City’s stepped ferrocrete superstructure, its walls clad in void-black adamantine ribs that double as blast bracing. A pressure-sealed vestibule opens onto a narrow living bay with built-in bunks, ration lockers, and a recessed wash alcove designed for strict contamination control. Illumination comes from lumen strips set behind armored grilles, casting hard light over scoured surfaces and stenciled quarantine notices. A single slit-window of thickened plasglass admits the city’s bruise-hued auroral glow while maintaining full seal integrity.
